形貌.仪器: SU-8010 高分辨率场发射扫描电子显微镜（Hitachi, Tokyo, Japan）
形貌.SEM: 冷冻干燥后的纯PAAS气凝胶含有一些平行片状结构，表明仍发生了冰晶的各向异性生长，该结构在热酰亚胺化后通常会消失，原因可能是气凝胶发生收缩

红外_FTIR.仪器: Nicolet 6700 Fourier transform infrared spectrometer (Thermo Scientific, Waltham, MA, USA)
红外_FTIR.说明: 无1540 cm⁻¹（酰胺II）和1660 cm⁻¹（酰胺C=O伸缩振动）信号，表明酰亚胺化成功

核磁_NMR.仪器: Bruker Avance III HD 400 MHz NMR spectrometer
核磁_NMR.C13_NMR: 存在特征信号：165.6 ppm (酰亚胺C=O)、156.2 ppm (苯氧碳)、115-134 ppm (芳环)；170-190 ppm和70-90 ppm的峰归属于魔角旋转产生的旋转边带

形貌.仪器: SU-8010 high-resolution field emission scanning electron microscope (Hitachi, Tokyo, Japan)
形貌.SEM: 孔径分布更小，片层结构不明显；与PI/CNC复合气凝胶相比，孔径更小、孔隙更致密，为热酰亚胺化后的横截面形貌

红外_FTIR.仪器: Nicolet 6700 Fourier transform infrared spectrometer (Thermo Scientific, Waltham, MA, USA)

核磁_NMR.仪器: Bruker Avance III HD 400 MHz NMR spectrometer
核磁_NMR.C13_NMR: Characteristic signals of CNCs: 65.6 ppm (C6 crystalline), 70-75 ppm (C2, C3, C5), 84-89 ppm (C4), 104.9 ppm (C1)

形貌.仪器: SU-8010 high-resolution field emission scanning electron microscope (Hitachi, Tokyo, Japan)
形貌.SEM: Freeze-dried pure CNC aerogel forms much larger pores than composite aerogels; low concentration of CNCs is insufficient to form strongly packed networks; the aerogel is too fragile for further studies

红外_FTIR.仪器: Nicolet 6700 Fourier transform infrared spectrometer (Thermo Scientific)
红外_FTIR.说明: FTIR谱图与纯PI气凝胶相似，表明CNC的加入不影响PI的亚胺化，存在CNC的羟基特征峰，说明大量CNC经热亚胺化后仍保留在复合气凝胶中

核磁_NMR.仪器: Bruker Avance III HD 400 MHz NMR spectrometer
核磁_NMR.C13_NMR: 检测到PI的特征信号：165.6 ppm (C=O of imide moiety)、156.2 ppm (phenoxy carbon)、115-134 ppm (aromatic rings)，同时检测到CNC的特征信号：65.6 ppm (C6 crystalline)、70-75 ppm (C2, C3, C5)、84-89 ppm (C4)、104.9 ppm (C1)；未发现新信号，表明大部分CNC未被热亚胺化降解，PAA与CNC反应极少，复合气凝胶实现完全亚胺化

形貌.仪器: SU-8010 high-resolution field emission scanning electron microscope (Hitachi)
形貌.SEM: 与不同CNC浓度的PI/CNC复合气凝胶形貌相似，具有CNC诱导形成的片层结构，平行孔来源于冰晶沿冷冻前沿的各向异性生长，相比纯PI气凝胶片层结构更明显，孔径更大

红外_FTIR.仪器: Nicolet 6700 Fourier transform infrared spectrometer (Thermo Scientific, Waltham, MA, USA)

核磁_NMR.仪器: Bruker Avance III HD 400 MHz NMR spectrometer
核磁_NMR.C13_NMR: Contains characteristic signals of CNCs (65.6 ppm (C6 crystalline), 70-75 ppm (C2, C3, C5), 84-89 ppm (C4), 104.9 ppm (C1)) and PI (165.6 ppm (C=O imide moiety), 156.2 ppm (phenoxy carbon), 115-134 ppm (aromatic rings)); peaks around 170-190 ppm and 70-90 ppm are magic angle spinning sidebands; no new signals detected, most CNCs remained undegraded after thermal imidization, complete imidization achieved

形貌.仪器: SU-8010 high-resolution field emission scanning electron microscope (Hitachi, Tokyo, Japan)
形貌.SEM: Has lamellar structure; paralleled pores formed from anisotropic growth of ice crystals along the freezing front

红外_FTIR.仪器: Nicolet 6700 Fourier transform infrared spectrometer (Thermo Scientific, Waltham, MA, USA)

核磁_NMR.仪器: Bruker Avance III HD 400 MHz NMR spectrometer
核磁_NMR.C13_NMR: 检测到PI的特征信号：165.6 ppm (C=O imide moiety)、156.2 ppm (phenoxy carbon)、115-134 ppm (aromatic rings)；同时检测到CNCs的特征信号：65.6 ppm (C6 crystalline)、70-75 ppm (C2, C3, C5)、84-89 ppm (C4)、104.9 ppm (C1)；未发现新信号，表明大部分CNCs经热酰亚胺化后未降解，PAA与CNCs反应极少，实现了完全酰亚胺化

形貌.仪器: SU-8010 high-resolution field emission scanning electron microscope (Hitachi, Tokyo, Japan)
形貌.SEM: 不同CNC浓度的PI/CNC气凝胶形貌相似，具有层状结构，平行孔由冰晶体沿冻结前沿各向异性生长形成；与纯PI气凝胶相比，孔径更大，层状结构更明显，CNC的存在足以诱导形成该层状结构

质谱_LCMS.仪器: Bruker Daltonics Esquire 2000 ion trap mass spectrometer with Agilent G1607-6001 ESI source
质谱_LCMS.说明: 理论分子量为288 g mol⁻¹，峰偏移±1可归因于氢，结果证实合成产物为ACAT

峰位_2theta: 15-20° (2θ, broad peak, attributed to semi-crystalline nature with periodic parallel polymer chains)

XRD_WAXS.说明: 38.01°处的特征衍射表明零价金主要沿(111)方向生长，证明形成了纯金纳米晶体

sample_id: doi:10.3390/polym11121918_conducting polyaniline doped with gold nanoparticles_01
